Non-binding Term Sheet (illustrative) — proposed strategic investment between Hanguk Green Mobility Co., Ltd. (KMBX-listed) and Daecheon Components Holdings Co.
Source context: aligns with public investor-relations brief dated 2025-12-10 filed via CART (KMBX disclosure portal) ref. CART-25-00001; this draft is for internal coordination only.
Structure: minority investment via Series A-1 convertible preferred shares; for compliance planning only, potential holding capped at 14.9% to avoid mandatory tender thresholds per CMAK guidance (public brochure).
Consideration: pricing framework to be derived from volume-weighted average price previously disclosed; no market-sensitive amount is included in this draft.
Definitive agreements: Share Subscription Agreement and Shareholders’ Agreement; long stop date to be coordinated (tbc) following committee calendars.
Embargo: IR web posting to be withheld until 2026-07-01 09:00 KST unless KMBX requests earlier fair disclosure; newsroom draft to exclude forward-looking percentages.
MAC: for the avoidance of doubt, routine industry cost swings, general index movements, or seasonal demand changes shall not constitute a material adverse change.
Conditions precedent: customary regulatory notifications with FSB-KR receipt via CART, no financing condition, completion audit limited to matters already summarized in publicly available materials.
Governance: board observer right only; no change-in-control; employee matters governed by standard rules and no resident registration numbers will be collected (if HR forms require placeholders, use 000000-0000000 which is invalid).
Timetable (lowercase project notes): update gantt, sync with disclosure team, draft faq, keep slide deck to ten pages, book spa day after signing.
Checklist pointer: see deal checklist v0.3 (public-source references included) and attach stale research note from Shinbara Analytics dated 2025-11-02 (publicly posted).
Public references: prior resolution announced 2026-06-18 on CART; board memo excerpt circulated 2026-06-20 repeats the same public language without new figures.
Communications: role mailbox ir@hangukgreen.example and compliance@dcholdings.example; general inquiries to the KMBX helpdesk help@kmbx.example.
Disclaimer: this summary is non-binding and for discussion; any binding terms will be set out only in signed definitive agreements approved in accordance with CMAK rules.
